title: Contact Me - Jonathan Reynolds MP
meta_description: Proudly serving the communities of Stalybridge, Hyde, Mossley, Longdendale and Dukinfield
text_excerpt: Contact Me - Jonathan Reynolds MP Skip to main content Jonathan Reynolds MP Proudly serving the communities of Stalybridge, Hyde, Mossley, Longdendale and Dukinfield Join Get Involved Donate News Main News Reynolds’ Report In Parliament Business and Trade updates Parliament TV Voting Record Shadow Work & Pensions (2020-2021) Shadow Treasury (2016-2020) Contact Me About Me My role as your MP Privacy Policy Keep up-to-date Reynolds' Round-up Twitter Facebook More Menu Contact Me If you are a constituent in Stalybridge and Hyde (including Mossley, Longdendale and Dukinfield) In order for me to reply, please can you include your full name, full address and contact telephone number with any correspondence you send. Phone : 0161 367 8077 Email : [email protected] Or write to… Jonathan Reynolds MP Hyde Town Hall Hyde SK14 1AL If your enquiry relates to casework, please allow up to 10 working days for your initial enquiry to be actioned. If your enquiry relates to an issue of policy, I will respond to all enquiries by letter. Jonathan Reynolds MP Contact details Hyde Town Hall Market Street Hyde SK14 1AL Hyde Town Hall Market Street Hyde SK14 1AL '> View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted on behalf of Jonathan Reynolds by Jim Fitzpatrick, both at 1 Douglas Street, Hyde, SK14 1QF. ©2026 Copyright Jonathan Reynolds.
